he6cb354dg0735g44acg9f45g2a2c9d84b19d: |Bold to assume that the Gith could help cure you. It doesn't surprise me in the slightest that you are still on the verge of Ceramorphosis.|
h57405b47g857ag4a88g9a05g85708d35db8a: |I'm done listening to him. Lae'zel dispose of our unwanted guest.|
ha6a49e4cgbabcg414eg9289gf37998ae038a: |If you keep that attitude my deal may be off the table. Farewell.|
hc6f8260fg979cg4696g93cbg56aa00a5442c: |We need your help. Surely you must be ready to make your deal now.|
h46d4b02fg55c3g443egb087g4e20a56a7d1c: |The time isn't right, but remain patient. I would never condemn you to that ghastly fate.|
hed084d5ag3c5eg4b26ga934g35302e44cbbf: |Don't buy into his facade. He only has his own interests in mind.|
ha60faab0g2c35g47f2ga84cg6c672fb37ef8: |Sleep well. I will be back soon.|
h4314a514g87b4g4946ga68dgec3674c0fae7: |We can find our own cure. We don't need your help.|
h6ed81fc4gba25g4b14ga831gd6a76f13ae20: |Your arrogance is hilarious. You will be hard-pressed to find someone to cure you.|
hb2d05289g7d9cg46f7g825ag84b2c500d016: |I am without a doubt your best option for curing your ailment.|
h1334a8f0g00fdg4944ga5fcge48f145f722b: |I've met a lot of con artists in my life, and this smells like a con to me|
h46ba5414g5bb7g4992g817ege6b6b2fc301d: |I will leave you to sleep on it.|
h7e2705d3g0b12g40cfg8e1cg1d70ce1c52fb: |We need your help. Surely you must be ready to make your deal now.|
h693000f5ge7c4g4ac7gb69bg7a9bd4e31d50: |We can find our own cure. We don't need your help.|
h253b7812gbcd7g4ae0gadcdgd150ce54aaf6: |Bold to assume that the Gith could help cure you. It doesn't surprise me in the slightest that you are still on the verge of Ceramorphosis.|
h6e419bf9g7913g4712gadf3g5a6e00014dd2: |Sleep well. I will be back soon.|
